name: China Aerospace Science and Technology Corporation

overview.value: CASC is a large state-owned enterprise group and one of the Fortune Global 500 firms. It was formally founded on July 1, 1999, originating from the Fifth Academy of the Ministry of National Defense established in 1956. CASC is mainly engaged in the research, design, manufacture, test and launch of space products, including launch vehicles, satellites, manned and cargo spacecraft, deep space explorers, and space stations, as well as strategic and tactical missile systems. The company describes itself as the leading force of China's space industry.

focus.value: Research, design, manufacture, test and launch of space products (launch vehicles, satellites, manned spacecraft, cargo spacecraft, deep space explorers, space stations) and strategic and tactical missile systems
